# Zappy — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Zappy is a website-building platform targeting business owners, offering a fast and efficient solution to create a perfect business website in just 7 minutes. The webinar landing page is designed to attract existing Zappy customers, showcasing the simplicity and speed of the platform. The brand communicates a sense of empowerment, speed, and ease — helping entrepreneurs take their business online effortlessly.

---

### בית
https://zappy.zappy5.app
Zappy is a website-building platform targeting business owners, offering a fast and efficient solution to create a perfect business website in just 7 minutes. T

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://zappy.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://zappy.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Zappy
Zappy is a website-building platform targeting business owners, offering a fast and efficient solution to create a perfect business website in just 7 minutes. The webinar landing page is designed to attract existing Zappy customers, showcasing the simplicity and speed of the platform. The brand communicates a sense of empowerment, speed, and ease — helping entrepreneurs take their business online effortlessly.

## Target Audience
- לקוחות Zappy - בעלי עסקים
- לקוחות קיימים של Zappy
- יזמים חדשים

## Industry
טכנולוגיה / בניית אתרים
